idea-plugin.name: FAH Failure Sound
idea-plugin.description:
Hear build and run results instantly across JetBrains IDEs.

FAH Failure Sound plays configurable audio cues for key IDE events, so you can stop watching output tabs and still notice failures, warnings, and successful runs.

  • Build events: failed, warning, succeeded
  • Run/Debug events: failed, succeeded
  • External build events: Gradle failed, Maven failed
  • Per-event sound source: bundled, custom file, or no sound
  • Per-event image/GIF source: bundled, custom file, or no overlay
  • Per-event sound duration, per-event overlay duration, global volume, debounce, notifications, and optional image/GIF overlays
  • Preset import/export and notification quick actions for Build, Run, and Problems tool windows
  • Custom local .mp3, .wav, .png, .jpg, and .gif files from your IDE config folder
  • Works as a platform plugin across JetBrains IDEs without requiring Gradle/Maven as mandatory dependencies
  • No external services and no internal JetBrains APIs required

Useful for quick feedback loops while coding, especially when builds run in the background.

Source code | Issue tracker
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.1.2

  • Added per-event image/GIF settings, separate sound and overlay durations, preset import/export, and notification quick actions for Build, Run, and Problems
  • Improved build-result routing so warnings no longer also trigger success sounds and higher-priority failures are not swallowed by global debounce timing
  • Improved overlay media rendering and updated the plugin icon so the logo appears larger and less zoomed out in JetBrains IDEs and the Marketplace
  • Kept the plugin compatible across JetBrains IDEs while continuing to bundle error.mp3, succeed.mp3, cooked.jpg, and happy.gif
